steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content: The blank fills "factors that help local businesses ______." The sentence then says that focus "benefits investors and the local economy" — a clearly positive outcome. The correct word must describe businesses succeeding or flourishing.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — thrive: means to prosper and flourish; factors helping businesses thrive would naturally benefit investors and the local economy. ✓
  • Choice B — disperse: means to scatter or spread apart; businesses dispersing implies dissolution, not a benefit to the economy. ✗
  • Choice C — ebb: means to gradually decline; helping businesses ebb would weaken them — the opposite of the positive outcome stated. ✗
  • Choice D — overspend: means to spend beyond one's means; that would harm businesses financially, not benefit the economy. ✗
That confirms A is correct.
